case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITON $2283.OO U.S. et al

docket_entries.description: MATTER ON CALENDER, WEDNESDAY, JUNE 23, 2010. NO APPEARANCE BY EITHER PARTY. PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO PETITIONER'S FIRST SET OF DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS, PETITIONER'S FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM INTERROGATORIES IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. RESPONDENT IS ORDERED TO RESPOND WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMMISSIONER EVERETT HEWLETT JR., NOT REPORTED (612).

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim
Off Calendar Nov-09-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. Petitioner PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's Motion For Order Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim is granted. No opposition has been filed. The claim is ordered stricken. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported. (218/EAH)

Ntc Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner'S First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspectiojn Of Documents; First Set Of Special Interrogatories ; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Jun-23-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Matter on calender, Wednesday, June 23, 2010. No appearance by either party. PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner's First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents, Petitioner's First Set Of Special Interrogatories And Judicial Council Form Interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Respondent is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Commissioner Everett Hewlett Jr., not reported (612).
